명령: User request: Make me an app for shift handoffs.
Concrete goal: deliver a local first-screen shift handoff board for fictional charge nurse workflows with create, filter, complete-task, responsive, accessibility, and state coverage.
수행 사전 작업: Created an app_product Goal Contract with target users, workflows, content/data/state assumptions, scope boundaries, verification matrix, and evidence plan.
Delegated implementation, verification, and review around the handoff board app surface and protected against real patient data or external services.
수행 내용: Implemented the handoff board, fictional records, priority filters, add/edit form, task completion, and empty/loading/error/validation/success states.

Verification recorded build, lint, focused behavior test, local run, desktop 1440x900 visual evidence, mobile 390x844 visual evidence, primary workflow behavior, accessibility basics, and state coverage.
Review used real_subagent independence and accepted the app_product result with score 94 against a threshold of 90.
수행 결과: Verification outcome: build, lint, test, run, behavior, security, secret scan, and scope checks passed.
Runnable access: local dev server was available at http://localhost:5173 for the accepted handoff board.
Unverified checks: none recorded in the accepted review.
Remaining risk: this is a local fictional prototype and must not be used with real patient data.
risks_or_follow_up: The prototype is local-only and must not be used with real patient data.
